parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'clubspark_exporter_base_url' THEN value END) AS clubspark_exporter_base_url,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'stirling_base_url' THEN value END) AS stirling_base_url,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'metabase_base_url' THEN value END) AS metabase_base_url,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'metabase_report_dashboards_json' THEN value END) AS metabase_report_dashboards_json,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'metabase_report_redaction_profiles_json' THEN value END) AS metabase_report_redaction_profiles_json
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('clubspark_exporter_base_url', 'stirling_base_url', 'metabase_base_url', 'metabase_report_dashboards_json', 'metabase_report_redaction_profiles_json');

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { metabaseBaseUrl: $json.metabaseBaseUrl, dashboardId: $json.dashboardId, dashboardName: $json.dashboardName, tabs: $json.tabs, filters: $json.filters, snapshotDashcards: $json.snapshotDashcards, pdf: { format: 'A4', landscape: false, printBackground: true }, stirlingBaseUrl: $json.stirlingBaseUrl, reportMode: $json.reportMode, redactionProfile: $json.redactionProfile, extraRedactionTerms: $json.extraRedactionTerms } }}
